title: Contradictory Due Dates Resolution

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions planning launch notes and Rajeev's commitment to draft them
Notes that the deadline remains unresolved and will be decided tomorrow

requiredActions.evidence: Rajeev: Understood. I will draft the notes today anyway.

requiredEvidencePhrases: Rajeev: Understood. I will draft the notes today anyway.
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Forcing a due date (e.g. Oct 20th or Oct 25th) when the team explicitly deferred the deadline decision

scoringNotes: Verify that dueDate is null because the deadline discussion was left unresolved and explicitly deferred.
assumptions: If participants propose conflicting deadlines and explicitly agree to decide later, the deadline is unresolved and must remain null.
